facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 3,921 reviews. Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG keeps delivering.

Beachfront position on Bãi Dài. Two restaurants on-site. A full spa. Outdoor pool facing the ocean. Sleek rooms that actually match the photos.

This is the kind of property where you check in and immediately stop researching alternatives.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walk the beachfront, hit the pool, eat twice without leaving the resort. Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG earns that 4.8 for a reason. Full resort day incoming.
